userStories.title: Expand sections to cover all prompt roles
userStories.description:
The current sections in src/prompts/sections/ are incomplete — role-task.ts only covers the implementer role (standard/lite variants), and isolation.ts only covers the test-writer role (strict/lite). The PromptBuilder cannot be wired to them until they handle all 4 roles.

Expand both sections to cover all 4 roles:
- role-task.ts: add test-writer, verifier, single-session
- isolation.ts: add implementer, verifier, single-session

Critical: the implementer role-task MUST include explicit 'git commit' instructions (both standard and lite variants). This is the bug we are fixing. The instruction should say: 'When all tests are green, stage and commit ALL changed files with: git commit -m "feat: <description>"'

Update all existing section tests in test/unit/prompts/sections/ to cover the new role variants. Add new test cases for each added role. All existing tests must still pass.

Do NOT touch builder.ts or templates/ in this story.

Run: NAX_SKIP_PRECHECK=1 bun test test/unit/prompts/sections/ --timeout=60000
Commit: 'refactor: expand role-task and isolation sections to cover all roles'
acceptanceCriteria: role-task.ts exports buildRoleTaskSection that accepts 'implementer' | 'test-writer' | 'verifier' | 'single-session' as first arg (plus optional variant for implementer)
isolation.ts exports buildIsolationSection that accepts the same 4 roles (plus optional mode for test-writer)
implementer standard variant includes explicit 'git commit -m' instruction
implementer lite variant includes explicit 'git commit -m' instruction
All 4 roles covered in both sections return non-empty strings
New tests added for test-writer, verifier, single-session in both role-task and isolation
priorErrors:
Attempt 1 failed with model tier: fast: Review failed: Working tree has uncommitted changes:
  - nax/features/prompt-wire/prd.json
  - nax/status.json
  - test/unit/prompts/sections/isolation.test.ts
  - test/unit/prompts/sections/role-task.test.ts

Stage and commit these files before running review.

priorFailures.summary: Failed with tier fast, escalating to next tier

routing.reasoning: Straightforward copy-paste refactoring expanding two section files with role variants and mirroring test cases; no architectural changes, clear scope, well-defined acceptance criteria.

userStories.title: Wire PromptBuilder to sections, remove inline duplicates and template stubs
userStories.description:
The PromptBuilder in src/prompts/builder.ts has inline duplicates of the section logic: buildDefaultRoleBody(), buildIsolationRules(), buildStoryContext(), and a hardcoded CONVENTIONS_FOOTER. These must be replaced with calls to the sections from PW-001.

Changes to src/prompts/builder.ts:
1. Import buildRoleTaskSection from './sections/role-task'
2. Import buildIsolationSection from './sections/isolation'
3. Import buildStorySection from './sections/story'
4. Import buildConventionsSection from './sections/conventions'
5. In build(), replace inline function calls with section imports
6. Remove dead inline functions: buildDefaultRoleBody, buildIsolationRules, buildStoryContext, CONVENTIONS_FOOTER

Note on API: the expanded sections take role as first arg; builder must map PromptRole accordingly. Verifier role already uses buildVerdictSection — do not change that.

Also delete dead template stubs:
- src/prompts/templates/implementer.ts
- src/prompts/templates/test-writer.ts
- src/prompts/templates/verifier.ts
- src/prompts/templates/single-session.ts
- Remove src/prompts/templates/ dir if empty after deletion

Run: NAX_SKIP_PRECHECK=1 bun test test/unit/prompts/ --timeout=60000
Then: NAX_SKIP_PRECHECK=1 bun test test/ --timeout=60000 --bail
Commit: 'refactor: wire PromptBuilder to sections, remove inline duplicates and template stubs'
acceptanceCriteria: PromptBuilder.build() uses buildRoleTaskSection() from sections/ (no inline buildDefaultRoleBody)
PromptBuilder.build() uses buildIsolationSection() from sections/ (no inline buildIsolationRules)
PromptBuilder.build() uses buildStorySection() from sections/ (no inline buildStoryContext)
PromptBuilder.build() uses buildConventionsSection() from sections/ (no inline CONVENTIONS_FOOTER)
All existing builder and section tests pass
